candidates.theme: US-Iran War Escalation & Strait of Hormuz Blockade Threat
candidates.news_one_liner: Putin's Victory Day ceasefire signal joins Iran's peace demand as a second simultaneous de-escalation hint, but neither is yet a priced probability for energy or defense markets.

candidates.theme: AI Capex Supercycle Redirects Institutional Flows Into Semiconductors — Chip ETFs Dominate 2026 Inflows as Big Tech Loses Narrative Leadership
candidates.news_one_liner: ARK's top 11 AI and data center picks add a retail flow catalyst layer to the AI capex supercycle, reinforcing NVDA, PLTR, and AMD as dual institutional-retail conviction targets.

candidates.theme: G7 Synchronized Rate Hold — Hormuz Energy Shock Locks All Major Central Banks Into Monetary Paralysis Simultaneously
candidates.news_one_liner: RBA joins G7 central banks hiking into an energy shock, extending the synchronized monetary paralysis thesis to developed markets beyond the G7 core as ASX rate-sensitive stocks sell off.

candidates.theme: Commercial Space Launch Sector Institutionalization — Rocket Lab Record Contract and 2027 Breakeven Path Signal Government Demand Inflection
candidates.news_one_liner: Rocket Lab's record contract and 2027 breakeven path unlock institutional buying as commercial space transitions from speculative to earnings-visible.

candidates.theme: Google Digital Health Platform Consolidation — Fitbit Air and Google Health App Relaunch Signal Alphabet's AI-Wearables Push Into Apple's Core Health Ecosystem
candidates.news_one_liner: Google's Fitbit Air and AI health app relaunch escalate competition with Apple Watch and position Alphabet as a clinical data platform in the $500B digital health market.

candidates.theme: KOSPI Record High Divergence — Samsung and SK Hynix AI Semiconductor Demand Decouples Korean Equities From Global Risk-Off
candidates.news_one_liner: KOSPI hits record high as Samsung and SK Hynix AI chip demand overrides global risk-off, pulling EM fund inflows away from India and China.

candidates.theme: PLA Leadership Purge Escalation — Suspended Death Sentences for Two Former Defense Ministers Signal Sustained Chinese Military Command Instability
candidates.news_one_liner: China's death sentences for two ex-defense ministers deepen PLA command uncertainty, raising tail-risk premiums for Taiwan-exposed tech and semiconductor names.

candidates.theme: AI Capital Markets Integration — Anthropic Wall Street JV Exploration Signals Frontier Model Pivot to Finance as Federal Exclusion Redirects Commercial Strategy
candidates.news_one_liner: Google Cloud and Genpact's agentic AI deal for CFO offices extends AI-finance integration into enterprise operations, threatening SAP and Oracle while boosting GOOGL cloud revenue durability.

candidates.theme: DOD Defense AI Procurement Expansion — Anthropic Federal Blacklist Accelerates Govtech AI Consolidation Around Cleared Hyperscalers
candidates.news_one_liner: Anthropic's Wall Street JV exploration signals commercial pivot toward finance after DOD blacklisting, pressuring incumbent fintech while reinforcing hyperscaler dominance in government AI contracts.

candidates.theme: Meta Messaging Platform Consolidation — Instagram DM Encryption Removal Redirects Users to WhatsApp, Raising EU Regulatory Exposure
candidates.news_one_liner: Meta removes Instagram DM encryption and funnels users to WhatsApp, consolidating its messaging strategy but risking EU regulatory action under GDPR.

candidates.theme: AI and Cybersecurity Venture Capital Sustained Commitment — Israeli AlphaDrive $100M Fund and ANZ Execution Research Signal Structural Startup Ecosystem Depth
candidates.news_one_liner: A new $100M Israeli AI/cyber fund and ANZ execution research confirm sustained private capital commitment to AI and cybersecurity as structural growth sectors.

candidates.theme: Apple AI Product Litigation — Siri $250M Settlement Establishes Legal Precedent for AI Feature Misrepresentation Across Big Tech
candidates.news_one_liner: Apple's $250M Siri settlement creates a litigation blueprint threatening all big tech AI feature marketing claims, raising compliance costs sector-wide.
